rows.scripted: BARRIER IS DOWN. THE LANES OPEN.
rows.heard: Barrier is down. The lanes open.

rows.scripted: BARRIER INBOUND. [short pause] YOUR SHOTS MAY COME BACK.
rows.heard: Barrier inbound. Your shots may come back.

rows.scripted: BARRIER ON THE FIELD. MIND THE WALLS.
rows.heard: Barrier on the field. Mind the walls.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. BARRIER WILL NOT BREAK.
rows.heard: Five kills! Barrier will not break!

rows.scripted: BLITZ IS DOWN. CAUGHT BETWEEN DASHES.
rows.heard: Blitz is down, caught between dashes.

rows.scripted: BLITZ INBOUND. [short pause] HE IS ALREADY MOVING.
rows.heard: Blitz inbound. He is already moving.

rows.scripted: BLITZ ON THE FIELD. DO NOT LET HIM CHAIN.
rows.heard: Blitz on the field. Do not let him chain.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. BLITZ HAS NOT STOPPED ONCE.
rows.heard: Five kills! Blitz has not stopped once!

rows.scripted: CATACLYSM IS DOWN. COUNT THE QUAKES YOU SURVIVED.
rows.heard: Cataclysm is down! Count the Quakes you survived!

rows.scripted: CATACLYSM INBOUND. [short pause] DO NOT LET THIS ONE SETTLE IN.
rows.heard: Cataclysm inbound! Do not let this one settle in!

rows.scripted: CATACLYSM ON THE FIELD. EVERY SECOND COSTS YOU.
rows.heard: Cataclysm on the field. Every second costs you.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. CATACLYSM IS SHAKING THE MAP APART.
rows.heard: Five kills! Cataclysm is shaking the map apart!

rows.scripted: CHRONOS IS DOWN. THE SECONDS RUN TRUE AGAIN.
rows.heard: Kronos is down. The seconds run true again.

rows.scripted: CHRONOS INBOUND. [short pause] WATCH YOUR CLOCKS.
rows.heard: Kronos inbound! Watch your clocks!

rows.scripted: CHRONOS ON THE FIELD. TIME IS HIS NOW.
rows.heard: Gornos on the field! Time is his now!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. CHRONOS IS SPENDING YOUR TIME.
rows.heard: 5 kills. Kronos is spending your time.

rows.scripted: CRIMSON IS DOWN. THE POOLS GO STILL.
rows.heard: Crimson is down. The pools go still.

rows.scripted: CRIMSON INBOUND. [short pause] POLICE YOUR DEAD.
rows.heard: Crimson inbound. Police, you're dead.

rows.scripted: CRIMSON ON THE FIELD. EVERY LOSS FEEDS HIM.
rows.heard: Crimson on the field. Every loss feeds him.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. CRIMSON DRINKS THE WHOLE FRONT.
rows.heard: 5 kills. Crimson drinks the whole front.

rows.scripted: CRUSHER IS DOWN. THE GROUND KEEPS ITS SHAPE.
rows.heard: Crusher is down. The ground keeps its shape.

rows.scripted: CRUSHER INBOUND. [short pause] YOUR COVER IS TEMPORARY.
rows.heard: Crusher inbound. Your cover is temporary.

rows.scripted: CRUSHER ON THE FIELD. THE MAP IS NEGOTIABLE.
rows.heard: Crusher on the field! The map is negotiable!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. CRUSHER IS REDRAWING THE FRONT.
rows.heard: Five kills. Crusher is redrawing the front.

rows.scripted: DOMINATOR IS DOWN. THE THREADS SNAP.
rows.heard: Dominator is down! The threads snap!

rows.scripted: DOMINATOR INBOUND. [short pause] SCATTER. DO NOT BUNCH.
rows.heard: Dominator inbound. Scatter. Do not bunch.

rows.scripted: DOMINATOR ON THE FIELD. YOUR FORMATION IS HIS WEAPON.
rows.heard: Dominator on the field. Your formation is his weapon.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. DOMINATOR PULLS EVERY STRING.
rows.heard: Five kills. Dominator pulls every string.

rows.scripted: ECLIPSE IS DOWN. THE LIGHT RETURNS.
rows.heard: Eclipse is down. The light returns.

rows.scripted: ECLIPSE INBOUND. [short pause] TRUST YOUR EARS.
rows.heard: Eclipse inbound. Trust your ears.

rows.scripted: ECLIPSE ON THE FIELD. THE DARK IS HERS.
rows.heard: Eclipse on the field. The dark is hers.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. ECLIPSE HAS SWALLOWED THE LIGHT.
rows.heard: Five kills. Eclipse has swallowed the white.

rows.scripted: FIREBRAND IS DOWN. THE FIRES GO WITH HIM.
rows.heard: Firebrand is down. The fires go with him.

rows.scripted: FIREBRAND INBOUND. [short pause] CLEAR THE GRASS.
rows.heard: Firebrand inbound. Clear the grass.

rows.scripted: FIREBRAND ON THE FIELD. THE GROUND WILL BURN.
rows.heard: Firebrand, on the field! The ground will burn!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. FIREBRAND IS COOKING.
rows.heard: Five kills. Firebrand is cooking.

rows.scripted: FROSTBITE IS DOWN. [short pause] THE THAW BEGINS.
rows.heard: Frostbite is down. The thaw begins.

rows.scripted: FROSTBITE INBOUND. [short pause] DRESS FOR WINTER.
rows.heard: Frostbite inbound. Dress for winter. Frostbite inbound. Dress for winter.

rows.scripted: FROSTBITE DEPLOYED. THE COLD TAKES THE FIELD.
rows.heard: Frostbite deployed. The cold takes the field.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. FROSTBITE IS AN ICE AGE.
rows.heard: Five kills. Frostbite is an ice age. Five kills. Frostbite is an ice age.

rows.scripted: GARGOYLE IS DOWN. STONE AT LAST.
rows.heard: Gargoyle is down! Stone at last!

rows.scripted: GARGOYLE INBOUND. [short pause] LISTEN FOR THE SHRIEK.
rows.heard: Gargoyle, inbound! Listen for the shriek.

rows.scripted: GARGOYLE IS AIRBORNE. THE SHRIEK IS YOUR WARNING.
rows.heard: Gargoyle is airborne. The shriek is your warning.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. GARGOYLE OWNS EVERY ROOF.
rows.heard: Five kills. Gargoyle owns every roof.

rows.scripted: GRAVITY WARDEN IS DOWN. THE WEIGHT RETURNS.
rows.heard: Gravity Warden is down. The weight returns.

rows.scripted: GRAVITY WARDEN INBOUND. [short pause] MIND YOUR FOOTING.
rows.heard: Gravity Warden inbound! Mind your footing!

rows.scripted: GRAVITY WARDEN ON THE FIELD. DOWN IS A SUGGESTION NOW.
rows.heard: Gravity Warden on the field. Down is a suggestion now.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. GRAVITY WARDEN OWNS THE SKY AND THE FLOOR.
rows.heard: Five kills. Gravity Warden owns the sky and the floor.

rows.scripted: INFERNO IS DOWN. THE SKY COOLS.
rows.heard: Inferno is down. The sky cools.

rows.scripted: INFERNO INBOUND. [short pause] WATCH THE SKY BURN.
rows.heard: Inferno inbound. Watch the sky burn.

rows.scripted: INFERNO IS AIRBORNE. THE SKY IS ON FIRE.
rows.heard: Inferno is airborne. The sky is on fire.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. INFERNO IS RAINING FIRE.
rows.heard: 5 kills. Inferno is raining fire.

rows.scripted: LEVIATHAN IS DOWN. THE EARTH EXHALES.
rows.heard: Leviathan is down! The earth exhales!

rows.scripted: LEVIATHAN INBOUND. [short pause] READ THE SHADOWS.
rows.heard: Leviathan inbound. Read the shadows.

rows.scripted: LEVIATHAN ON THE FIELD. THE GROUND IS PROVISIONAL.
rows.heard: Leviathan on the field! The ground is provisional!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. LEVIATHAN IS FLATTENING THE FRONT.
rows.heard: Five kills. Leviathan is flattening the front.

rows.scripted: MAGNETAR IS DOWN. OPEN FIRE.
rows.heard: Magnetar is down. Open fire!

rows.scripted: MAGNETAR INBOUND. [short pause] YOUR BULLETS WON'T LAND.
rows.heard: Magnetar inbound. Your bullets won't land.

rows.scripted: MAGNETAR ON THE FIELD. CLOSE THE DISTANCE.
rows.heard: Magnetar on the field! Close the distance!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. MAGNETAR EATS EVERY ROUND.
rows.heard: 5 kills. Magnetar eats every round.

rows.scripted: MIRAGE IS DOWN. THE REAL ONE, THIS TIME.
rows.heard: Mirage is down. The real one this time.

rows.scripted: MIRAGE INBOUND. [short pause] COUNT YOUR TARGETS TWICE.
rows.heard: Mirage inbound. Count your targets twice.

rows.scripted: MIRAGE ON THE FIELD. ONE OF THEM IS REAL.
rows.heard: Mirage on the field! One of them is real!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. MIRAGE IS AN ARMY OF ONE.
rows.heard: Five kills! Mirage is an army of one!

rows.scripted: NIGHTMARE IS DOWN. THE CONTACTS CLEAR.
rows.heard: Nightmare is down! The contact's clear!

rows.scripted: NIGHTMARE INBOUND. [short pause] TRUST NOTHING RED.
rows.heard: Nightmare inbound. Trust nothing red.

rows.scripted: NIGHTMARE ON THE FIELD. YOUR MAP IS LYING.
rows.heard: Nightmare on the field! Your map is lying!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. NIGHTMARE IS IN EVERY HEAD.
rows.heard: Five kills. Nightmare is in every head.

rows.scripted: OBLIVION IS DOWN. THE VOID CLOSES.
rows.heard: Oblivion is down! The void closes!

rows.scripted: OBLIVION INBOUND. [short pause] DO NOT CLUSTER.
rows.heard: Oblivion inbound! Do not cluster!

rows.scripted: OBLIVION IS ON THE FIELD. WATCH FOR THE PULL.
rows.heard: Oblivion is on the field. Watch for the pull.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. OBLIVION IS SWALLOWING THE MAP.
rows.heard: Five kills. Oblivion is swallowing the map.

rows.scripted: OVERLOAD IS DOWN. THE CIRCUIT IS COLD.
rows.heard: Overload is down. The circuit is cold.

rows.scripted: OVERLOAD INBOUND. [short pause] STEP OFF THE PLATE.
rows.heard: Overload inbound! Step off the plate!

rows.scripted: OVERLOAD ON THE FIELD. EVERY WIRE IS A DOOR.
rows.heard: Overload on the field. Every wire is a door.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. OVERLOAD RUNS THE WHOLE GRID.
rows.heard: Five kills! Overload runs the whole grid!

rows.scripted: PHANTOM IS DOWN. THE WALLS ARE WALLS AGAIN.
rows.heard: Phantom is down! The walls are walls again!

rows.scripted: PHANTOM INBOUND. [short pause] WATCH YOUR WALLS.
rows.heard: Phantom inbound! Watch your walls!

rows.scripted: PHANTOM ON THE FIELD. YOUR MACHINES ARE NOT YOURS.
rows.heard: Phantom on the field, your machines are not yours.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. PHANTOM IS EVERYWHERE AND NOWHERE.
rows.heard: Five kills. Phantom is everywhere and nowhere.

rows.scripted: PLAGUEBEARER IS DOWN. VENTILATE AND ADVANCE.
rows.heard: Plaguebearer is down! Ventilate in advance!

rows.scripted: PLAGUEBEARER INBOUND. SEAL YOUR MASKS.
rows.heard: Plague Bear, inbound! Seal your masks!

rows.scripted: PLAGUEBEARER WALKS THE FIELD. THE AIR IS NOT YOUR FRIEND.
rows.heard: Plague Bearer walks the field. The air is not your friend.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. THE OUTBREAK IS WINNING.
rows.heard: Five kills. The outbreak is winning.

rows.scripted: PULSE IS DOWN. THE AIR STOPS RINGING.
rows.heard: Pulse is down. The air stops ringing.

rows.scripted: PULSE INBOUND. [short pause] WALLS WILL NOT SAVE YOU.
rows.heard: Pulse inbound. Walls will not save you.

rows.scripted: PULSE ON THE FIELD. HE HEARS EVERYTHING.
rows.heard: Pulse on the field. He hears everything.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. PULSE HAS THE WHOLE MAP TAGGED.
rows.heard: Five kills! Pulse has the whole map tagged!

rows.scripted: PYROCLASM IS DOWN. LET IT COOL.
rows.heard: Pyroclasm is down! Let it cool!

rows.scripted: PYROCLASM INBOUND. [short pause] THE FLOOR WILL NOT BE YOURS.
rows.heard: Pyroclasm inbound! The floor will not be yours!

rows.scripted: PYROCLASM ON THE FIELD. MIND THE POOLS.
rows.heard: Pyroclasm on the field! Mind the pools!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. PYROCLASM IS PAVING THE MAP.
rows.heard: Five kills! Pyroclasm is paving the map!

rows.scripted: RAGEBEAST IS DOWN. STAND EASY.
rows.heard: Rage Beast is down! Stand easy!

rows.scripted: RAGEBEAST INBOUND. DO NOT FEED IT.
rows.heard: Rage beast inbound! Do not feed it!

rows.scripted: RAGEBEAST IS LOOSE. [short pause] GOOD LUCK.
rows.heard: Rage beast is loose! Good luck!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. [short pause] STOP FEEDING THE BEAST.
rows.heard: Five kills! Stop feeding the beast!

rows.scripted: REACTOR IS DOWN. THE OVERCHARGE FADES.
rows.heard: Reactor is down. The overcharge fates.

rows.scripted: REACTOR INBOUND. [short pause] KILL THE BATTERY FIRST.
rows.heard: Reactor inbound. Kill the battery first.

rows.scripted: REACTOR ON THE FIELD. THEIR CARRY JUST GOT STRONGER.
rows.heard: Reactor on the field. Their carry just got stronger.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. REACTOR IS FEEDING THE WHOLE LINE.
rows.heard: Five kills! Reactor is feeding the whole line!

rows.scripted: REAPER IS DOWN. THE HUNT IS OFF.
rows.heard: Reaper is down. The hunt is off.

rows.scripted: REAPER INBOUND. [short pause] NOBODY WANDERS ALONE.
rows.heard: Reaper inbound! Nobody wanders alone.

rows.scripted: REAPER ON THE FIELD. SOMEBODY IS ALREADY MARKED.
rows.heard: Reaper on the field. Somebody is already morked.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. THE REAPER KEEPS HIS LEDGER.
rows.heard: Five kills. The Reaper keeps his ledger.

rows.scripted: RIPTIDE IS DOWN. THE WATER STILLS.
rows.heard: Riptide is down. The water stills.

rows.scripted: RIPTIDE INBOUND. [short pause] HIGH GROUND, NOW.
rows.heard: Riptide inbound! High ground, now!

rows.scripted: RIPTIDE ON THE FIELD. THE TIDE FIGHTS FOR US.
rows.heard: Riptide on the field, the tide fights for us.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. RIPTIDE IS DROWNING THE FIELD.
rows.heard: Five kills! Riptide is drowning the field!

rows.scripted: SHADOWSTEP IS DOWN. CHECK IT TWICE.
rows.heard: Shadow step is down. Check it twice.

rows.scripted: SHADOWSTEP INBOUND. [short pause] GUARD YOUR BACKS.
rows.heard: Shadow step inbound! Guard your backs!

rows.scripted: SHADOWSTEP ON THE FIELD. DO NOT CHASE HIM.
rows.heard: Shadow Step on the field! Do not chase him!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. SHADOWSTEP IS EVERYWHERE YOU ARE NOT.
rows.heard: Five kills! Shadow Step is everywhere you are not!

rows.scripted: SNIPERHAWK IS DOWN. THE LANES ARE YOURS.
rows.heard: Sniper Hawk is down! The lanes are yours!

rows.scripted: SNIPERHAWK INBOUND. [short pause] BREAK LINE OF SIGHT.
rows.heard: Sniper Hawk, inbound! Break line of sight!

rows.scripted: SNIPERHAWK IS PERCHED. WATCH THE LANES.
rows.heard: Sniper Hawk is perched. Watch the lanes.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. SNIPERHAWK OWNS THE SIGHTLINES.
rows.heard: Five kills. Sniper Hawk owns the sightlines.

rows.scripted: SPECTER IS DOWN. THE MIRRORS CRACK.
rows.heard: Spectre is down. The mirrors crack.

rows.scripted: SPECTER INBOUND. [short pause] COUNT THE SHADOWS.
rows.heard: Spectre Inbound. Count the shadows.

rows.scripted: SPECTER ON THE FIELD. THEY ALL WALK LIKE HIM.
rows.heard: Spectre on the field. They all walk like him.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. SPECTER IS A CROWD.
rows.heard: Five kills! Spectre is a crowd!

rows.scripted: STEEL WEAVER IS DOWN. DROP THE PANELS.
rows.heard: Steel Waver is down. Drop the panels.

rows.scripted: STEEL WEAVER INBOUND. [short pause] COUNT YOUR WALLS.
rows.heard: Steel Weaver inbound. Count your walls.

rows.scripted: STEEL WEAVER ON THE FIELD. THE MAP IS HIS ARMORY.
rows.heard: Steel Weaver on the field. The map is his armory.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. STEEL WEAVER WEARS THE REFINERY.
rows.heard: Five kills. Steel Weaver, where's the refinery?

rows.scripted: STORMCALLER IS DOWN. THE SKY CLEARS.
rows.heard: Stormcaller is down. The sky clears.

rows.scripted: STORMCALLER INBOUND. [short pause] GET UNDER SOMETHING.
rows.heard: Stormcaller inbound. Get under something.

rows.scripted: STORMCALLER IS AIRBORNE. THE WEATHER PICKS SIDES.
rows.heard: Stormcaller is airborne. The weather picks sides.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. STORMCALLER OWNS THE WEATHER.
rows.heard: Five kills. Stormcaller owns the weather.

rows.scripted: TITAN IS DOWN. [short pause] THE GROUND HOLDS STILL.
rows.heard: Titan is down. The ground holds still.

rows.scripted: TITAN INBOUND. [short pause] MOVE THE ARMOR.
rows.heard: Titan inbound! Move the armor!

rows.scripted: TITAN ON THE FIELD. NOTHING STAYS WHERE IT STANDS.
rows.heard: Tightened on the field, nothing stays where it stands.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. TITAN IS THROWING THE WHOLE FIELD.
rows.heard: Five kills! Titan is throwing the whole field!

rows.scripted: TREMOR IS DOWN. THE GROUND IS STILL.
rows.heard: Tremor is down. The ground is still.

rows.scripted: TREMOR INBOUND. [short pause] KEEP OFF THE OPEN GROUND.
rows.heard: Tremor inbound! Keep off the open ground!

rows.scripted: TREMOR HAS SURFACED. WATCH THE SOIL.
rows.heard: Tremor has surfaced! Watch the soil!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. TREMOR IS AN EARTHQUAKE.
rows.heard: 5 kills. Tremor is an earthquake.

rows.scripted: VANGUARD IS DOWN. THE LINE IS YOURS TO HOLD.
rows.heard: Varyngarde is down. The line is yours to hold.

rows.scripted: VANGUARD INBOUND. [short pause] THE DOOR IS ABOUT TO OPEN.
rows.heard: Vanguard inbound! The door is about to open.

rows.scripted: VANGUARD ON THE FIELD. FOLLOW THE SHIELD.
rows.heard: Vanguard on the field. Follow the shield.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. VANGUARD IS THE DOOR NOW.
rows.heard: Five kills. Vanguard is the door now.

rows.scripted: VENATRIX IS DOWN. SWEEP FOR HER TRAPS.
rows.heard: Venatrix is down! Sweep for her traps!

rows.scripted: VENATRIX INBOUND. [short pause] WATCH WHERE YOU STEP.
rows.heard: Venatrix, inbound! Watch where you step!

rows.scripted: VENATRIX ON THE FIELD. THE GROUND IS BAITED.
rows.heard: Venatrix on the field. The ground is baited.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. VENATRIX HAS A FULL TROPHY WALL.
rows.heard: Five kills. Venatrix has a full trophy wall.

rows.scripted: VENOM IS DOWN. LET IT DISPERSE.
rows.heard: Venom is down. Let it disperse.

rows.scripted: VENOM INBOUND. [short pause] CHECK YOUR SEALS.
rows.heard: Venom inbound. Check your seals.

rows.scripted: VENOM ON THE FIELD. THE AIR HAS TEETH.
rows.heard: Venom on the field! The air has teeth!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. VENOM OWNS EVERY BREATH.
rows.heard: Five kills. Venom owns every breath.

rows.scripted: VOIDWALKER IS DOWN. THE SHADOWS EMPTY.
rows.heard: Voidwalker is down. The shadow's empty.

rows.scripted: VOIDWALKER INBOUND. [short pause] CHECK YOUR SHADOWS.
rows.heard: Voidwalker inbound. Check your shadows.

rows.scripted: VOIDWALKER ON THE FIELD. HE IS ALREADY BEHIND SOMEONE.
rows.heard: Voidwalker on the field. He is already behind someone.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. VOIDWALKER IS EVERYWHERE AT ONCE.
rows.heard: Five kills. Voidwalker is everywhere at once.

rows.scripted: VOLT STRIKER IS DOWN. THE AIR GOES QUIET.
rows.heard: Volt Striker is down. The air goes quiet.

rows.scripted: VOLT STRIKER INBOUND. [short pause] SPREAD OUT.
rows.heard: Volt Striker inbound Spread out

rows.scripted: VOLT STRIKER ON THE FIELD. DO NOT BUNCH UP.
rows.heard: Volt Striker on the field! Do not bunch up!

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. VOLT STRIKER IS ARCING.
rows.heard: Five kills. Volt Striker is arcing.

rows.scripted: WRAITH IS DOWN. RECLAIM YOUR HARDWARE.
rows.heard: Wraith is down! Reclaim your hardware!

rows.scripted: WRAITH INBOUND. [short pause] EMPTY YOUR VEHICLES.
rows.heard: Wraith inbound! Empty your vehicles!

rows.scripted: WRAITH ON THE FIELD. YOUR MACHINES ARE HIS.
rows.heard: Wraith on the field. Your machines are his.

rows.scripted: FIVE KILLS. WRAITH IS WEARING YOUR ARMY.
rows.heard: Five kills. Wraith is wearing your army.
